CRITICAL HEALTH ALERT

MOSQUITO-BORNE

DISEASES

Every year, over 700 million people worldwide are infected by mosquito-borne diseases — claiming more than 830,000 lives. In India alone, 40 million+ cases strike annually. Understanding these threats is the first step to protecting your family.

0M+People Infected by Mosquitoes Globally Each Year
0K+Global Deaths From Mosquito Diseases Annually
0M+Cases in India Every Year

🦟 Know Your Enemy

THE THREATS

YOU FACE

Yellow Fever Mosquito · Aedes aegypti
ACTUAL SPECIES

— KEY FACTS

Dengue is the world's fastest-spreading mosquito-borne disease, infecting an estimated 390 million people globally every year — 96 million of which are clinically apparent. In India, 40 million+ cases are recorded annually, peaking during monsoon season. A single bite can be deadly. Moscure protects day and night.

— SYMPTOMS

  • ●High fever & severe headache
  • ●Pain behind the eyes
  • ●Joint and muscle pain
  • ●Fatigue, nausea, vomiting
  • ●Skin rash
  • ●Severe cases: plasma leakage, bleeding, organ impairment

— AFFECTED REGIONS

Delhi NCR90%
Mumbai85%
Uttar Pradesh80%
West Bengal75%
Maharashtra78%

— PREVENTION

  • ✓Eliminate stagnant water in pots, tires, and coolers
  • ✓Use mosquito repellents and wear protective clothing
  • ✓Ensure windows and doors have screens
  • ✓Moscure targets all disease-carrying mosquitoes indoors and outdoors

Moscure protects against Dengue Fever

Our MLID and Phototaxis Technology trap targets Aedes aegypti specifically. Chemical-free. Always on.

🛡 YOUR DEFENSE PLAN

HOW TO PROTECT

YOUR FAMILY

01

USE MOSCURE

Install Moscure devices in key areas of your home and garden to catch mosquitoes before they ever get the chance to bite.

Chemical-free. Always on. Always protecting.

02

ELIMINATE BREEDING

Remove standing water from containers, pots, coolers, and drains regularly. Mosquitoes need just a bottle cap of water to breed.

Weekly checks save lives.

03

EARLY DETECTION

Seek medical attention immediately if you or a family member experience sudden fever, joint pain, or any suspicious symptoms.

Hours matter. Don't delay.

04

STAY INFORMED

Monitor local health advisories and outbreak reports in your area. Stay ahead of seasonal disease spikes, especially during monsoon.

Knowledge is protection.

⏰ ACT NOW — DON'T WAIT

DON'T WAIT FOR

AN OUTBREAK

Protect your family today with Moscure. Prevention is always better than cure.

Join 10,000+ Indian families already protected by Moscure.

India's most effective MLID and Phototaxis technology mosquito trap. Chemical-free, family-safe protection against Dengue, Malaria, and Chikungunya.
